---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused capability or API
title: "feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What capability do you want to add?

## Motivation

What Kafka workflow, producer behavior, wire-layer capability, or user problem
does this solve?

## Proposed Shape

Describe the public API, internal design, or behavior you have in mind.

Please keep proposals within the project direction: 100% pure Rust, no native
Kafka client bindings, and no unsafe code.

## Alternatives

What other approaches did you consider?

## Testing and Performance

How should this be tested? If it touches hot paths, what benchmark or stress
test should cover it?
